case_title: PRTICHARD, ROBERT vs. TINH, TRAN et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TINH, TRAN NGUYEN, CHAU UC
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

JUDGE GEORGE T. CHOPPELAS; MBRADY REPORTER; JPASTOR/BCHIN CLERKS; C/C FOR S/C; J. MARGULIES FOR PLTF AND DEFTS TRAN TINH & CHAU UC NGUYEN & ATTY R. DAVIS PRESENT. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO FILE STIP.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TINH, TRAN NGUYEN, CHAU UC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 730 O'FARRELL ST, APT 1 SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,455.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,455.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-01-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, S/E TO 01-DEC-96 ON THE CONDITION $1,455 RENTS ARE PAID BY 5PM 04-OCT-96. BOTH SIDES TO BEAR OWN ATTY FEES & COSTS. NOV 1996 RENT IS WAIVED. DEFTS HUYNH VAN DUONG, ERIC TOM, SUSAN TRAN & CINDY LIEU NO LONGER RESIDES NOR CLAIM ANY RIGHT TO POSSESSION. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FURTHER TERMS & CONDITIONS
